# Statistical Modeling & Machine Learning

{{< include _kmeans.qmd >}}

## Lasso Regression

{{< include _lasso.qmd >}}

## Statistical Analysis for Proportions and Rates

{{< include _Statistical_Proportions_and_Rates.qmd >}}

## Logistic Regression

{{< include _logistic_regression.qmd >}}

## Decision Trees

{{< include _decision_trees.qmd >}}

## Random Forests

{{< include _random_forests.qmd >}}

## Gradient Boosting

{{< include _gradient_boosting.qmd >}}

## Neural Networks in Sports Analytics
